{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dream Well
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Dream Well Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Dream Well is a source of purple water used to provide intense mental focus and invigorate users. Historically, a master utilized the well to reward productive employees, assist those needing to work without sleep, or ensure workers remained fully conscious during punishments. The water can also improve the quality of rest by smoothing out consciousness and turning restless sleep into a deep, soft state. When consumed, it acts as a restorative agent that can refresh a person's concentration and energy levels, effectively allowing them to start over when facing exhaustion. The facility containing the well was designed to maintain specific conditions, such as a [[dream aura]], which facilitates the creation of [[Sylvan Dreamseeds]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Dream Well is a location featuring clear, purple-tinted water designed to eliminate mental fatigue and boost focus in humans. Associated with a motto regarding the invigoration of movers and thinkers, its waters can be used for training purposes. [[Consuming]] the water can smooth out consciousness, improve sleep quality, and enhance reaction speed. During recent events, [[Lindon]] drank from the well, while its water was also used to improve the mental state of [[Orthos]]. Additionally, [[Dross]] spent a significant amount of time within the Dream Well.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Dream Well]] is a well containing clear water tinted purple that radiates focus and determination.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Dream Well]] is designed to boost focus and eliminate mental fatigue in humans.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Dream Well]] is a location associated with the motto 'Invigorating power to keep those motivated movers moving and those tired thinkers thinking.'<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dream Well water]] can smooth out consciousness and improve sleep quality.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Dream Well]] contains water that can be used for training.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] drank from the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Dream Well water]] improved [[Orthos]]' mental state.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|the [[Dream Well]] improves reaction speed and focus.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] spent a long time in the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] found [[Dross]] in the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“That was one of the mottos I was working on for the Dream Well, what do you think?”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
